connector_labels.description: Site-supplied attribution map pairing a source top-level folder with its registered connector label. Used by data.activity and data.refresh when the chunks table lacks the canonical data_source column and attribution falls back to the source_path top-folder. Axiom ships an empty map; folders without an entry pass through unchanged. Operator-durable home: <config-dir>/data_platform.toml as [[data_platform.connector_labels]] entries.

folder.description: Top-level folder name exactly as it appears in source_path.

connector.description: Registered connector name the folder's documents are attributed to.
